plugins.name: reflect
plugins.description: Date-scoped fork of the built-in /insights command. Generate the same eight-section report bounded to a window (last 24h, this week, etc.) instead of the full month.

plugins.name: skylark
plugins.description: Autonomous development pipeline — vocabulary-routed expert panels with risk-proportional gating, Linear integration, and artifact provenance. Single /skylark:implement entry point routes any input (issue, spec, bug report, idea) through triage, prepare, spec-review, write-plan, plan-review, develop, and finish.

plugins.name: llmstxt
plugins.description: Create and maintain llms.txt navigation files across large content vaults. Agent-first directory maps that cut traversal tokens in deep knowledge bases, following the llmstxt.org convention.

plugins.name: roadrunner
plugins.description: XState v5 deterministic pipeline engine for composed AI-assisted development workflows. Seven-layer orchestrator with vocabulary-routed expert generation, task DAG decomposition, and OpenLLMetry telemetry.

plugins.name: experts
plugins.description: Vocabulary-routed expert reviews and development. Generates bespoke domain experts on-the-fly using Forge methodology — precise terminology activates deep knowledge clusters, producing reviews that catch domain-specific issues generic reviewers miss.

plugins.name: triad
plugins.description: Three-agent (PM/PgM/EM) autonomous development framework coordinating via file-based inbox messaging over tmux. Historical experiment preserved for analysis and remixing.
